name: Agitprop
tagline: Soviet constructivist storefront: scarlet and black editions, diagonal blocks, type as weapon.
voice: urgent constructivist print shop: clipped campaign language, edition numbers, workshop dispatches, red-label CTAs, no softness or lifestyle phrasing.
layout_hints: type-led hero with enormous condensed slogan and red CTA slab
constructivist diagonal red and black blocks behind featured product art
shop grid as edition posters in rigid framed tiles
hard black borders, scarlet labels, asymmetric columns, no rounded corners
footer should feel like a print colophon, not a lifestyle brand footer
